{{Quote|I'm with the ''Mand'alor'' on this. We lost nearly a million and a half people fighting the ''vongese''. That might be small change for Coruscant, but it's a disaster for us. No more—not until we get ''Manda'yaim in order''.|Neth Bralor|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
'''Neth Bralor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] who lived during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Bralor attended a meeting of Mandalorian clan leaders on behalf of [[Clan Bralor|his clan]] at [[MandalMotors Hall]] in [[Keldabe/Legends|Keldabe]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. Along with several other [[Chief/Legends|chieftains]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], and heads of Mandalorian corporations, Bralor met with reigning [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to discuss the place of Mandalore and its people in the course of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] latest conflict between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]]-led [[Confederation]]. Amidst the discussions, Bralor raised his hoarse voice in support of Fett's proposal of neutrality in favor of concentrating on rebuilding Mandalore's infrastructure in the wake of the [[Battle of Mandalore (Yuuzhan Vong War)|devastation]] dealt to the Mandalorian [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />

==Behind the scenes==
Neth Bralor first appeared in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the fifth novel of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series, [[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice|''Sacrifice'']], written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[May 29]], [[2007]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
